meaning: 见 jilin ;<日>n.麒麟(常见于雕刻和瓷器上)
examples: Say, we brought you a souvenir. It’s a Kirin model.
Kirin had not even started clearing out its main gate on Tuesday.
Kirin also makes other drinks which were stacked up in its warehouse.
Lamson pulled out part of a beer crate that read "Exclusively for Kirin Beer" in Japanese.
Japan meet Paraguay in the final game of the three-nation Kirin Cup in Saitama on Tuesday.
